talents.name: Path of Healing
talents.desc: Lay on hands to heal a companion's attributes.

talents.name: Path of Sight
talents.desc: Sense unnatural phenomena and read nature's omens.

talents.name: Path of Shifting Shapes
talents.desc: Take the form of an animal.

gear: One trade good of your choice
pride: You are nobler than other people and the gods love you more.
You sense unnatural phenomena before anyone else.
Demons instinctively fear you.
dark_secret: You enjoy wallowing in the mud and to live off what others would never eat.
As everyone and everything are part of Clay's creation, you lack respect for other's property.
You are a moralizing know-i t-a ll who thinks you always know the will of the gods.

talents.name: Path of the Blade
talents.desc: Reroll melee attack dice; a master of the sword.

talents.name: Path of the Enemy
talents.desc: Read a foe and anticipate their moves in a duel.

talents.name: Path of the Shield
talents.desc: Parry with a shield and guard your allies.

gear: A one-handed weapon of your choice
pride: You never back away from a fight.
You can endure any injury.
You never betray your friends.
dark_secret: You sometimes take to the bottle to chase away the memories of all those you have killed.
Secretly you enjoy inflicting pain and injury on others.
Once, you killed a Rust Brother, and you are now wanted by them.

talents.name: Path of the Arrow
talents.desc: Deadlier with the bow; extra effect on ranged hits.

talents.name: Path of the Beast
talents.desc: Bond with and command an animal companion.

talents.name: Path of the Forest
talents.desc: Move unseen and unhindered through the wilds.

pride: You can survive alone in the wilds for weeks.
Your arrow always hits its mark.
The animals of the forests are your friends and do you no harm.
dark_secret: You feel uncomfortable among other people and prefer to be alone.
The old wound from the claw of a demonic beast never fully healed.
Once, you left a wounded friend to die in the woods to save yourself.

talents.name: Path of the Hymn
talents.desc: Sing to heal and hearten your companions.

talents.name: Path of the Song
talents.desc: Sway moods and minds with performance.

talents.name: Path of the Warcry
talents.desc: A battle-shout that frightens foes or steels allies.

pride: Your songs can bring warmth to the coldest of hearts.
You remember all the tales and legends of the Forbidden Lands.
Your friends trust you with their lives.
dark_secret: You are haunted by doubt and don't believe in the songs you sing.
You are secretly deeply in love with an NPC or another PC.
You once served the Rust Brothers as their jester, but managed to escape.

talents.name: Path of Treasure
talents.desc: You sniff out riches and always have a useful trinket.

talents.name: Path of Words
talents.desc: Talk past trouble; lies come easily.

talents.name: Path of Many Things
talents.desc: Produce just the right item from your pack.

gear: Three trade goods of your choice
pride: You have honest eyes.
You can make anyone trust you.
When you hear of treasure, nothing can stop your pursuit of it.
dark_secret: You owe silver to a powerful individual. A lot of silver.
You conned a Rust Brother and now they are bent on revenge.
You don't trust anyone and think they all want to take your silver.

talents.name: Path of the Companion
talents.desc: Your mount obeys without a roll and fights at your side.

talents.name: Path of the Knight
talents.desc: Devastating mounted charges.

talents.name: Path of the Plains
talents.desc: Endure and navigate the open wilds.

pride: Aslenians are nobler than other people.
On your horse, you are faster than the wind.
Horse or no horse, you never lose your balance.
dark_secret: You enjoy setting things on fire - ostensibly in the name of the god Horn, but you like it, too.
Your horse is more important to you than any human. Others cannot understand your bond.
You panic in closed and cramped chambers.

talents.name: Path of the Face
talents.desc: Disguise and assume other identities.

talents.name: Path of the Killer
talents.desc: Strike harder against the unaware.

talents.name: Path of Poison
talents.desc: Brew and apply poisons.

gear: Two trade goods of your choice
pride: No one has a softer step than you.
You only steal from those who deserve it.
No one can catch you.
dark_secret: You compulsively steal valuables you catch sight of.
Once, you stole something valuable from a Rust Brother and now they seek revenge.
Your purse is often empty, for you spend silver as swiftly as you obtain it.

talents.name: Path of Blood
talents.desc: Blood magic - healing and harm.

talents.name: Path of Death
talents.desc: Necromancy and command of the dead.

talents.name: Path of Signs
talents.desc: Runes and symbols of power.

talents.name: Path of Stone
talents.desc: Shape earth and stone.

pride: Nothing scares you, as you have seen the world behind the veil.
Whoever threatens you will die a painful death.
You have read many books and you know the ways of the world.
dark_secret: You are haunted by visions of the world behind the veil.
Your yearning for more magical power is stronger than anything else.
Zygofer the Spellbinder haunts you in your dreams and makes you obey him.

talent: Once per session reroll a roll for a skill you have no rank in.
Sense thoughts and emotions; a touch of the mind's eye.
Heal attributes and Willpower by meditating instead of sleeping.
Halve the damage from falling, crushing, and exhaustion.
Reroll one die when you defend, flee, or dodge.
See in the dark and thrive at night.
Once per session, ignore the effects of being Broken for one turn.
Reroll dice when you track or hunt in the wild.

_source: Forbidden Lands Player's Handbook 5th printing (real Pride/Dark Secret/skills/talents/age rules)
